title: bitter pillowy peruvian pork chops tacos
description: A show-off Peruvian dish featuring pork chops, coconut-cream-crack, and a hint of bitterness. A diabetic-friendly twist on traditional pork tacos.
instructions: Season the pork chops with salt, pepper, and a pinch of cumin.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork chops for 2-3 minutes per side, then set aside to rest.
In the same skillet, add diced onions and cook until translucent.
Add diced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in coconut cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the sauce thicken for 2-3 minutes.
Warm tacos shells according to package instructions.
Slice the rested pork chops thinly against the grain.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few slices of pork onto each shell, then topping with the coconut cream sauce and any desired toppings.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and a sprinkle of queso fresco if desired.
